5-best-doner.headline: Walk Berlin's ancient core with a local — then grab that kebab.
5-best-doner.sub: 12 stops, 800 years of history, ~2 hours. From Alexanderplatz to Hackescher Markt. Tip-based, no fixed price — a perfect appetite builder.

airport-to-alex.headline: Let a local show you Berlin's ancient core — free.
airport-to-alex.sub: 12 stops, ~2h, starts at the World Clock. Tip-based, no fixed price, no credit card needed.

default.headline: Discover Berlin with a local — free.
default.sub: 12 stops, 800 years of history, ~2 hours. From Alexanderplatz to Hackescher Markt. Tip-based, no fixed price.
